name: HMS Leeds (G 27)
events: 27 Nov 1941 HMS Leeds (Cdr. C.L.de H. Bell, RD, RNR) is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
5 Dec 1941 HMS Leeds (Cdr. C.L.de H. Bell, RD, RNR) is undocked. (1)
13 Apr 1942 HMS Leeds (Lt. F.M. Graves, RN) is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
15 Apr 1942 HMS Leeds (Lt. F.M. Graves, RN) is undocked. (1)
16 Oct 1942 HMS Leeds (Lt. E.F. Hamilton-Meikle, RN) is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
21 Oct 1942 HMS Leeds (Lt. E.F. Hamilton-Meikle, RN) is undocked. (1)
28 Oct 1942 HMS Leeds (Lt. E.F. Hamilton-Meikle, RN) is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
29 Oct 1942 HMS Leeds (Lt. E.F. Hamilton-Meikle, RN) is undocked. (1)

1 Jun 1943 HrMs O 14 (Lt.Cdr. H.A.W. Goossens, RNN) conducted A/S exercises in the Firth of Forth with HMS Leeds (Lt. B.H. Brown, RN), HMS Lady Beryl and HMS Stella Conopus (T/Skr. L. Ford, RNR). HMS Vivien (Lt. L.E. Blackmore, RN). (2)
5 Oct 1943 HMS Uther (Lt. P.S. Beale, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Dundee with HMS Wolsey (Lt.Cdr. S.A. Cuthbert, RN) and HMS Leeds (Lt. B.H. Brown, RN). (3)
17 Jan 1944 HMS Leeds (Lt. B.H. Brown, RN) is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
21 Jan 1944 HMS Leeds (Lt. B.H. Brown, RN) is undocked. (1)
5 Apr 1945 HMS Leeds (T/Lt. D.I. Lang, RNR) is docked in the floating dock (AFD 3) at the Rosyth Dockyard. (1)
7 Apr 1945 HMS Leeds (T/Lt. D.I. Lang, RNR) is undocked. (1)
